summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of CyberRange AI application. All backend APIs, frontend UI components, LLM integration, and data persistence are working perfectly. The cyber-themed design is excellent with proper neon colors, fonts, and animations.
passed_tests: Phishing email generation with LLM integration
Ransomware scenario generation with MITRE ATT&CK mapping
Attack scenario generation with timeline visualization
Training question generation and answer submission
Home page loads with hero section and feature cards
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Phishing Simulator configuration and email preview
Ransomware Simulator infection flow and prevention tips
Training Mode Q&A with scoring system
Cyber-themed UI with neon colors and Rajdhani font
Data persistence in MongoDB across all modules
LLM integration with Gemini 3 Flash generates realistic content
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and integrations working
success_percentage.data_persistence: 100% - MongoDB storing and retrieving data correctly
success_percentage.design: 100% - Cyber-themed design with proper colors and fonts
